allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Users\\Sales\\Downloads\\BeamNG-drive-AnkerGames.zip"\); $z.Entries | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 40 FullName, Length; "---- total entries: $\($z.Entries.Count\)"; "---- executables/scripts ----"; $z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match '\\.\(exe|dll|bat|cmd|ps1|vbs|js|msi|scr|com|lnk\)$' } | Select-Object FullName, Length; $z.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Users\\Sales\\Downloads\\BeamNG-drive-AnkerGames.zip"\); foreach \($name in @\('Run Me!.bat','BeamNG.drive/Bin64/banana-bench.x64.bat','BeamNG.drive/Bin64/test_json_performance.bat'\)\) { $e = $z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq $name }; if \($e\) { "===== $name \($\($e.Length\) bytes\) ====="; $r = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($e.Open\(\)\); $r.ReadToEnd\(\); $r.Close\(\) } }; "===== sizes of notable binaries ====="; $z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match '\(OnlineFix64\\.dll|support\\.exe|steam_api64\\.dll|BeamMP-Launcher\\.exe|winmm\\.dll|version\\.dll|dinput8\\.dll\)$' } | Select-Object FullName, Length; $z.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($s = Get-MpComputerStatus; "AV enabled: $\($s.AntivirusEnabled\)  RealTime: $\($s.RealTimeProtectionEnabled\)  Signatures last updated: $\($s.AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated\)  Signature age \(days\): $\($s.AntivirusSignatureAge\)"; $p = Get-MpPreference; "Excluded paths: $\($p.ExclusionPath -join '; '\)"; "Excluded extensions: $\($p.ExclusionExtension -join '; '\)"; "Excluded processes: $\($p.ExclusionProcess -join '; '\)"; "---- recent threat detections ----"; Get-MpThreatDetection | Sort-Object InitialDetectionTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 ThreatID, InitialDetectionTime, Resources | Format-List)

PowerShell($dest = "C:\\Users\\Sales\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-Sales-Desktop-Tires-SOS\\55065548-b2fe-4584-85f4-4cebd900f1cf\\scratchpad\\zipcheck"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dest | Out-Null; Set-Location $dest; & "$env:windir\\System32\\tar.exe" -xf "C:\\Users\\Sales\\Downloads\\BeamNG-drive-AnkerGames.zip" "BeamNG.drive/Bin64/OnlineFix64.dll" "BeamNG.drive/support.exe" "BeamNG.drive/Bin64/steam_api64.dll" "BeamNG.drive/BeamMP-Launcher.exe"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File $dest | ForEach-Object { $h = Get-FileHash $_.FullName -Algorithm SHA256; "{0}  {1}  {2:N0} bytes" -f $h.Hash, $_.Name, $_.Length })
